claim: Decision. Shared identity / first-year relationship → custom song ($199, 7 days)
She loves her pet or a place → commissioned portrait ($100–$400, 2–6 wk)
Adventurous / bucket-list partner → hot-air balloon voucher (~$280, 1–2 yr validity)
Long-term, "I know her scent" partner → bespoke perfume (€240–$3,500, 2 wk–4 mo)
Last-minute under $150 → custom star map of the date she was born or you met
Digital $40–$75; watercolour $100–$200; oil $150–$300+; premium waitlist artists $1,000+
Perfumer interviews her or works from a brief, blends a scent that legally can't exist for anyone else
Private access to a space she's been through as a crowd; curator framing she can't buy on a normal ticket
£35/pp British Museum OOH[10]; Met before-hours from ~$387
Digital sub gives a year of skill-building from named experts; pairing with a physical star map print of a date that means something keeps it tangible
